title: glyceria fluitans var. spicata
intro: Glyceria fluitans var. spicata, also known as floating manna grass or spicate glyceria, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Glyceria fluitans var. spicata include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, while also providing relief from digestive problems, like diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments for skin conditions and wounds.
